meaning: n.小冲突v.进行一场小冲突
examples: After about 20 minutes, the skirmish was over.
The next skirmish will come at NRG's annual meeting on July 21st.
Guatemala was the first skirmish of the cold war in Latin America.
This skirmish could easily be a case of a dog chasing its own tail.
The skirmish is the latest in the Catalans' long war to defend their language.
